title: Amanda Moody
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Amanda Moody''' has provided voices for several Star Wars video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]], Gungan hovercraft captain, Naboo hovercraft captain
*[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']] – [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]]
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''
